home curves term premia about

Polish term premia: ACM and BRW decomposition

Adrian-Crump-Moench (2013) affine term-structure decomposition with Bauer-Rudebusch-Wu (2014) bias correction. Weekly time series 2005-2026.

Sample period
—
21 years
10y TP (latest, ACM)
—
bp
10y TP (latest, BRW)
—
bp, bias-corrected
5y TP (latest, ACM)
—
bp
2y TP (latest, ACM)
—
bp

Term premia by tenor — ACM

1y, 2y, 5y, 10y term premia from the affine ATSM. The 2014-2016 negative-TP episode and the 2022-2023 hiking-cycle spike are visible.

10y TP: ACM vs BRW

BRW corrects the upward bias in ACM under persistent factors. The wedge is largest when the curve is steep and rates are far from steady state.

10y decomposition: yield = expected rate + term premium

Stack the BRW-corrected expected-rate path with the term-premium component. Sum equals the fitted 10y zero rate.

5y vs 10y TP — relative dynamics

Term-premium curve slope (10y minus 5y). Steepens during stress, flattens during normalisation.
